
[source layer]
  (F-series)
    [must-fix] UF-F11 main.tex — \titleformat{\section} redefines template's heading style (required: no \titleformat redefinition of \chapter / \section / \subsection / \subsubsection / \paragraph (template handles these))
      fix: Remove the `\titleformat` redefinition; the UF template enforces the 5-tier heading hierarchy by construction (cls:304-362).
      see: https://github.com/YuZh98/latex2ufdissertation/blob/main/docs/uf-rules.md#uf-f11--heading-styles-5-tier-hierarchy

Summary: 1 must-fix, 0 review.

---
Note: Advisory (not a finding): The ufdissertation template produces untagged PDFs (no /StructTreeRoot, /MarkInfo, or /Lang entries). PDF/UA accessibility features such as tag structure, alt-text, table-header semantics, and reading order are therefore outside the scope of this tool's verification. This is a known template limitation, not a violation detected in your submission.
